title: Equipment & PackML Routing
description: Configuration tables: hierarchy, equipment registry, packml_register routing, production orders

list.name: enterprise
list.label: Enterprise
list.query: SELECT nm_enterprise AS __text, id_enterprise AS __value FROM enterprises ORDER BY nm_enterprise

list.name: site
list.label: Site
list.query: SELECT nm_site AS __text, id_site AS __value FROM sites WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) ORDER BY nm_site

list.name: area
list.label: Area
list.query: SELECT nm_area AS __text, id_area AS __value FROM areas WHERE id_site IN ($site) ORDER BY nm_area

list.name: equipment
list.label: Equipment
list.query: SELECT nm_equipment AS __text, id_equipment AS __value FROM equipments WHERE id_area IN ($area) ORDER BY nm_equipment

targets.rawSql: SELECT id_enterprise, nm_enterprise, active FROM enterprises WHERE id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) ORDER BY nm_enterprise

SELECT s.id_site, ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site FROM sites s JOIN enterprises ent ON ent.id_enterprise = s.id_enterprise WHERE s.id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND s.id_site IN ($site) ORDER BY ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site

SELECT a.id_area, ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site, a.nm_area, a.day_begin FROM areas a JOIN sites s ON s.id_site = a.id_site JOIN enterprises ent ON ent.id_enterprise = a.id_enterprise WHERE a.id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND a.id_site IN ($site) AND a.id_area IN ($area) ORDER BY ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site, a.nm_area

SELECT eq.id_equipment, ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site, a.nm_area, eq.nm_equipment, CASE eq.tp_equipment WHEN 1 THEN 'Machine' WHEN 2 THEN 'Sector' WHEN 3 THEN 'Line' ELSE eq.tp_equipment::text END AS tp_equipment, eq.status_type, eq.lead_machine, lm.nm_equipment AS nm_lead_machine FROM equipments eq JOIN areas a ON a.id_area = eq.id_area JOIN sites s ON s.id_site = eq.id_site JOIN enterprises ent ON ent.id_enterprise = eq.id_enterprise LEFT JOIN equipments lm ON lm.id_equipment = eq.lead_machine WHERE eq.id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND eq.id_site IN ($site) AND eq.id_area IN ($area) AND eq.id_equipment IN ($equipment) ORDER BY ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site, a.nm_area, eq.nm_equipment

panels.title: PackML Register — Topic Routing
panels.description: Maps SparkPlug B topics → equipment. active=true means oeecloud processes this topic.

targets.rawSql: SELECT pr.id_packml_register, ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site, a.nm_area, e.nm_equipment, pr.packml_topic, pr.active, pr.id_unit, pr.signal_quality, pr.timestamp FROM packml_register pr JOIN equipments e ON e.id_equipment = pr.id_equipment JOIN areas a ON a.id_area = e.id_area JOIN sites s ON s.id_site = e.id_site JOIN enterprises ent ON ent.id_enterprise = e.id_enterprise WHERE pr.id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND pr.id_site IN ($site) AND pr.id_area IN ($area) AND pr.id_equipment IN ($equipment) ORDER BY ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site, a.nm_area, e.nm_equipment

SELECT po.id_production_order, ent.nm_enterprise, s.nm_site, a.nm_area, e.nm_equipment, po.status, po.nm_production_order, po.ts_start, po.ts_end, po.production_final FROM production_orders po LEFT JOIN equipments e ON e.id_equipment = po.id_equipment LEFT JOIN areas a ON a.id_area = po.id_area LEFT JOIN sites s ON s.id_site = po.id_site LEFT JOIN enterprises ent ON ent.id_enterprise = po.id_enterprise WHERE po.id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND po.id_site IN ($site) AND po.id_area IN ($area) AND po.id_equipment IN ($equipment) ORDER BY po.id_production_order DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Shifts
panels.description: Shift definitions and hours. begin_time/end_time are seconds from week_begin (Monday 00:00 = 0).

targets.rawSql: SELECT sh.id_shift, s.nm_site, a.nm_area, sh.cd_shift, sh.nm_shift, TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + (sh2.begin_time || ' seconds')::interval, 'Dy HH24:MI') AS begin_day_time, TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) + (sh2.end_time || ' seconds')::interval, 'Dy HH24:MI') AS end_day_time, sh2.begin_time, sh2.end_time FROM shifts sh JOIN sites s ON s.id_site = sh.id_site LEFT JOIN areas a ON a.id_area = sh.id_area JOIN shift_hours sh2 ON sh2.id_shift = sh.id_shift WHERE s.id_site IN ($site) ORDER BY sh.id_shift, sh2.begin_time

panels.title: Production Order Runtimes
panels.description: One row per PO run segment. Open ts_end = currently running. Paused PO = all segments closed, PO status ≠ 3.

targets.rawSql: SELECT por.id_production_order_runtime, po.nm_production_order, po.status AS po_status, e.nm_equipment, por.ts_start, por.ts_end, por.net_production, por.scrap, por.recalc_needed FROM production_orders_runtime por JOIN production_orders po ON po.id_production_order = por.id_production_order LEFT JOIN equipments e ON e.id_equipment = por.id_equipment WHERE po.id_enterprise IN ($enterprise) AND po.id_site IN ($site) AND po.id_area IN ($area) AND por.id_equipment IN ($equipment) ORDER BY por.id_production_order_runtime DESC LIMIT 100
